zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Daniel Moulton於1731年5月9日出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓時，他的父親Jonathan Moulton28歲，母親Elizabeth Lamprey29歲。他於1750年4月25日與Grace Reynolds在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1731年住在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆也。他去世於1809年8月26日在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛享年78歲，埋葬在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛登斯坦 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Daniel Moulton于1731年5月9日出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓时，他的父亲Jonathan Moulton28岁，母亲Elizabeth Lamprey29岁。他于1750年4月25日与Grace Reynolds在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1731年住在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆也。他去世于1809年8月26日在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛享年78岁，埋葬在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛登斯坦 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave in the cemetery list
Historical Boundaries: 1760: Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Cumberland, Massachusetts, United States 1820: Cumberland, Maine, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Creating the Eleventh Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Eleventh Amendment restricts the ability of any people to start a lawsuit against the states in federal court.

historicEvents.title: Whitehead Light
historicEvents.description: In 1804, President Thomas Jefferson authorized the creation of a light station on Whitehead Island. The light house went into service by 1807. It is the third-oldest light house in Maine. Whitehead Light still exists as the private property of Pine Island Camp, a non-profit organization.

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Daniel Moulton was born on 9 May 1731, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, his father, Jonathan Moulton, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Lamprey, was 29. He married Grace Reynolds on 25 April 1750, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States in 1731. He died on 26 August 1809, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States, at the age of 78, and was buried in Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Daniel Moulton est né le 9 mai 1731, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Jonathan Moulton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lamprey, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Grace Reynolds le 25 avril 1750, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis en 1731. Il est décédé le 26 août 1809, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Daniel Moulton am 9. Mai 1731 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jonathan Moulton 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lamprey 29. Er hat am 25. April 1750 in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Grace Reynolds geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1731 hat er in Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 26. August 1809 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Daniel Moulton è nato il il 9 maggio 1731 nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Jonathan Moulton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lamprey, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Grace Reynolds il 25 aprile 1750, nel Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1731. Morì il 26 agosto 1809, nel Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain Daniel Moultonが1731年5月9日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンで生まれた時，父Jonathan Moultonは28歳，母Elizabeth Lampreyは29歳であった。1750年4月25日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウでGrace Reynoldsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1731年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムリに住んでいた。彼は1809年8月26日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウで78歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウダンスタン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드 스카버루그h
ko.lifeSummary: Captain Daniel Moulton(이)가 1731년 5월 9일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jonathan Moulton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lamprey(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1750년 4월 25일 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 Grace Reynolds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1731년도에 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 리에서 살았다. 그는 1809년 8월 26일 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h 던스탠 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Daniel Moulton nasceu em 9 de maio de 1731, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Jonathan Moulton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lamprey, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Reynolds em 25 de abril de 1750, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Rye, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América em 1731. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1809, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New H: роккингхам, нюфиелдс, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: скарбороую, кумбирланд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Daniel Moulton родился 9 мая 1731 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Jonathan Moulton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lamprey, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Reynolds 25 апреля 1750 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности ри, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в 1731 году. Он умер 26 августа 1809 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности дунстань кеметири, скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain Daniel Moulton nació el 9 de mayo de 1731, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, Jonathan Moulton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lamprey, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Grace Reynolds el 25 de abril de 1750, en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Rye, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos en 1731. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1809, en Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Dunstan Cemetery, Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos.
